title: Spicy Malaysian Baked Chicken
description: A flavorful and spicy chicken dish inspired by Malaysian cuisine, with a crispy almond crust.
instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together spicy flour, salt, and black pepper.
3. In another bowl, mix together almond flour and milk to create a smooth paste.
4. Dip the chicken breast in the melted butter, then in the almond flour mixture, and finally in the spicy flour mixture.
5. Place the coated chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Drizzle the melted butter over the chicken.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until cooked through.
8. During the last 5 minutes of baking, add sliced mighty ginger on top of the chicken.
9. Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
